sets.title: Operational Transition Announcement
sets.context: A company announcement explains a revised transition window and exception process.
sets.audio_script: Attention, all Brightline Insurance employees. This is an operational update regarding the pharmacovigilance reporting transition scheduled for March 11. Because a data-retention requirement that applies retroactively to pilot records, the first validation window will now run from March 11 through March 17, and only teams with completed access certification may submit production changes during that period. Managers must upload their revised staffing rosters by 5:00 p.m. two business days before the window opens. Requests submitted after the deadline will be routed to the exception queue and will require director approval. Please note that the earlier intranet notice remains incorrect where it states that all teams may continue using the legacy workflow. The signed transition memo supersedes that notice. Employees with critical customer-impacting work should contact the operations desk and include the project code, the affected region, and a brief justification.

questions.question_text: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To introduce a new employee wellness benefit
options.B: To announce that the transition has been permanently cancelled
options.C: To explain a revised validation window and related approval requirements
options.D: To invite employees to a voluntary social event

questions.explanation: The announcement centers on the revised validation window, certification requirement, roster deadline, and exception queue.

questions.question_text: What must managers do before the validation window opens?

options.A: Delete all legacy workflow records
options.B: Call every customer in the affected region
options.C: Approve director exceptions without review
options.D: Upload revised staffing rosters by the stated deadline

questions.explanation: Managers are told to upload revised rosters by 5:00 p.m. two business days before the window starts.

questions.question_text: What does the announcement imply about the earlier intranet notice?

options.A: It conflicts with the signed memo and should not be relied on.
options.B: It extends the validation window by one quarter.
options.C: It applies only to employees in the finance department.
options.D: It has already been approved by the client liaison.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the intranet notice is incorrect and that the signed transition memo supersedes it.
